svg.text: From blank page to publish-ready content in 6 steps
Your voice. Your stories. AI-structured pipeline.

g.text: Ranked content spikes with topic + angle
Gets you to reveal the unexpected
OUTPUT: Deep interview transcript with stories, data points, and frameworks
Raw .md file — the source of truth
Your exact words, stories, and examples

Pick a content type, draft with your style
